identity: Hyena-folk (gnoll) male scavenger, humanoid with a hyena head — brown and tan fur, pointed hyena ears, a long snout with small fangs visible, intense yellow eyes, mangy tufted mane.
outfit: Layered rough brown leather rags and wrapped cloth bindings across the torso, rope belts, no metal armor.
weapons: A crude jagged scavenged iron cleaver with a rope-wrapped wooden handle, held in the right paw.
attackStyle: East-facing. Mid-slash cleaver sweep forward at chest height, right paw gripping the handle, body hunched low, fur bristling.
spellStyle: East-facing. Cleaver lowered, head tilted back in a hyena howl, faint brown-orange dust aura swirling around him.
blockStyle: East-facing. Cleaver held horizontally across the chest in both paws, hunched low.
koStyle: East-facing, on all fours, cleaver dropped beside him, head bowed, fur slumped.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), hunched idle. Cleaver held at the side in the right paw, hyena face clearly visible, mane and ears prominent.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Hyena-folk head with brown-and-tan fur, pointed ears, long snout with small fangs, yellow eyes, rough brown leather rags across the torso.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Hyena-folk (gnoll) male scavenger, humanoid with a hyena head — brown and tan fur, pointed hyena ears, a long snout with small fangs visible, intense yellow eyes, mangy tufted mane.

OUTFIT: Layered rough brown leather rags and wrapped cloth bindings across the torso, rope belts, no metal armor.

WEAPONS: A crude jagged scavenged iron cleaver with a rope-wrapped wooden handle, held in the right paw.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Hyena-folk (gnoll) male scavenger, humanoid with a hyena head — brown and tan fur, pointed hyena ears, a long snout with small fangs visible, intense yellow eyes, mangy tufted mane.

OUTFIT: Layered rough brown leather rags and wrapped cloth bindings across the torso, rope belts, no metal armor.

WEAPONS: A crude jagged scavenged iron cleaver with a rope-wrapped wooden handle, held in the right paw.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Hyena-folk head with brown-and-tan fur, pointed ears, long snout with small fangs, yellow eyes, rough brown leather rags across the torso.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
